description: Worker plan with raw activity events for formatting

plan.description: Full markdown plan text from the worker's ExitPlanMode call — this is the primary content to format

events.description: Raw worker activity events from DB (filtered to meaningful types only). Chronological order, from the latest task assignment to now.

data.description: Event payload. worker_spawning/follow_up: {prompt}. tool_use: {tool, input}. assistant_message: {text}. plan_proposed: {text}. question_asked: {question}. question_answered: {answer}. plan_approved/plan_rejected: varies.
